title: achnatherum tenuifolium
intro: Achnatherum tenuifolium, also known as Rocky Mountain grass or Poverty grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achnatherum tenuifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves or roots in hot water.
